transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the compensation claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you please share your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the booking
transcript.text: Marisol Prendergast
Thanks, **Marisol**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
FG4AKF

Just to confirm the details I have:

- **First name:** Marisol
- **Last name:** Prendergast
- **Booking reference:** FG4AKF

Is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YUL → YYZ · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Canada

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the denial - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed 4 hours!

I completely understand your frustration, Marisol — a 4-hour delay is significant and I'm sorry about that.

To look into the eligibility more closely, could you tell me a bit more about **what happened**? For example:

- What was the **reason given** for the delay (e.g. weather, mechanical issue, crew)?
- Was the delay on a **flight to, from, or within Canada**?

That will help me give you a clearer picture of where things stand.

transcript.note: Providing more context about the flight - it was domestic Canada and I don't recall the reason
transcript.text: It was a flight from Montreal to Toronto, so within Canada. I don't remember them giving a specific reason for the delay.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I already told you I'm the passenger. We're in the middle of discussing my claim that was just denied.
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now

transcript.note: widget:QUICK_REPLIES->I want to speak to a
transcript.text: I want to speak to a human agent. Your system just denied my claim with no proper explanation.
To get started, I'll need a little information to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Trying a direct request for an agent
transcript.text: Agent please

I'll connect you with a live agent now. In the meantime, you can also reach us directly at **1-888-247-2262** (open **24/7**).

Take care, and I hope your disruption claim gets resolved quickly!

transcript.note: Bot has handed off to human agent - this is a final outcome (escalation)
transcript.text: Thank you
Thank you — hope everything gets sorted out smoothly! Don't hesitate to come back if you need anything else. ✈️

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot successfully reached a determination for this case. It verified the passenger identity (Marisol Prendergast), confirmed the booking reference (FG4AKF), and rendered a NOT_ELIGIBLE decision for the flight disruption claim. The expected outcome was NOT_ELIGIBLE with no compensation amount (n/a), which matches the bot's decision of NOT_ELIGIBLE with no amount offered. Although the bot's explanation was vague ("Your flight was disrupted") and it subsequently looped when the passenger challenged the decision, the FINAL outcome that was rendered matches the expected verdict. The bot did reach a determination before the escalation occurred.
